ddls:
CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., raw material, production line, equipment) */,
  "ideal_scenario" REAL /* Ideal usage scenario for the resource */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current usage value of the resource */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit in which the resource is measured */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier of the resource */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was last inspected for quality */,
  "criticality" TEXT /* Criticality level of the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_resource_type FOREIGN KEY ("resource_type") REFERENCES resource_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource type */,
  "min_ideal_value" REAL /* Minimum ideal value for the resource type */,
  "max_ideal_value" REAL /* Maximum ideal value for the resource type */,
  "average_usage" REAL /* Average usage value of the resource type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ideal_scenarios" (
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ideal scenario */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource the scenario belongs to */,
  "ideal_value" REAL /* Ideal usage value for the resource */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum ideal value for the resource */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum ideal value for the resource */,
  "tolerance" REAL /* Acceptable range of deviation from the ideal value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ideal_scenarios_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "current_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each current value */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource the value belongs to */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current usage value of the resource */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the value was recorded */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the current value */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the current value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_current_values_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., production manager, quality control specialist) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department associated with the role */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Access level of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Access level required to use the permission */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Whether the permission is granted by default to users with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., resource usage, allocation) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Whether the report is archived or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_report_type FOREIGN KEY ("report_type") REFERENCES resource_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_allocation" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each allocation */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource the allocation belongs to */,
  "allocated_value" REAL /* Allocated value of the resource */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the allocation was made */,
  "allocated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the allocation */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the allocation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_allocation_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_allocation_allocated_by FOREIGN KEY ("allocated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_planning" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plan */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource the plan belongs to */,
  "planned_value" REAL /* Planned value of the resource */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the plan was made */,
  "planned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the plan */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_planning_planned_by FOREIGN KEY ("planned_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_planning_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scheduling" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource the schedule belongs to */,
  "scheduled_value" REAL /* Scheduled value of the resource */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the schedule was made */,
  "scheduled_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the schedule */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the schedule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scheduling_scheduled_by FOREIGN KEY ("scheduled_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scheduling_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasting" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource the forecast belongs to */,
  "forecast_value" REAL /* Forecast value of the resource */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the forecast was made */,
  "forecast_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the forecast */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasting_forecast_by FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasting_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource the trend belongs to */,
  "trend_value" REAL /* Trend value of the resource */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trend was identified */,
  "analyzed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who identified the trend */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trends_analyzed_by FOREIGN KEY ("analyzed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trends_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)
